# VER-QUIC-RFC9000-0015 - QUIC RFC 9000 ECN-CE Immediate ACK Scheduling Verification

## Scope

This verification covers the supported ACK-generation consequence after packet processing reports an ECN Congestion Experienced observation for an Application Data packet: the packet number space requires immediate ACK scheduling, ordinary non-CE Application Data packets keep normal delayed-ACK scheduling, and the CE-triggered immediate flag clears after ACK emission before rearming on a later CE packet.

## Requirements Verified

- REQ-QUIC-RFC9000-S13P2P1-0014

## Verification Method

Requirement-home execution, reciprocal trace inspection, and SpecTrace render/check for the bounded CE immediate-ACK scheduling proof.

## Preconditions

- Packet processing has already classified the received packet as ECN Congestion Experienced.
- The processed packet is tracked in the Application Data packet number space.
- Endpoint-level IP-header observation, ECN enablement, and congestion response are outside this proof slice.

## Procedure or Approach

- Run the focused RFC 9000 requirement-home tests for S13P2P1-0014 and the existing S13P2P5 ACK_ECN cross-reference test.
- Render and check the touched SpecTrace artifacts.
- Confirm the focused artifact set is reciprocal only for the intended S13P2P1 CE immediate-ACK requirement.
- Confirm that no endpoint ECN enablement, IP-header parsing, ACK_ECN codec, sender-side ECN validation, congestion response, public API, or interop ECN claim is introduced.

## Expected Result

Focused tests prove positive CE immediate-ACK scheduling, a non-CE delayed-ACK control case, and rearm behavior after ACK emission. No parser, serializer, wire-format, hot-path production, or endpoint ECN enablement behavior is introduced by this proof slice.

## Status

Passed locally on 2026-04-25. Focused CE immediate-ACK requirement-home tests and the existing ACK_ECN cross-reference test passed, and the focused reciprocal trace check linked only S13P2P1-0014 to the new artifact set.

## No New Wire Or Hot Path

This slice adds focused trace and requirement-home proof for existing ACK-generation behavior. It does not alter parser, serializer, wire-format, state-machine, or hot-path production code, so no new fuzz or benchmark surface is introduced here.
